note: This is a roof replacement job in Oro Valley we completed today we replaced a tile roof and sealed all of the valleys
draftCopy: Our crew wrapped up a tile roof replacement in Oro Valley today. This flat roof section got fresh decking and sealed valleys before the tile goes back on. If your Tucson-area tile roof needs repair or replacement, we'd be happy to take a look.
